'''Tk'lokk''' was a small insectoid creature that could often be seen sitting on [[Ssk Kahorr]]'s shoulder.

He was killed when [[Naga Sadow/Legends|Naga Sadow's]] invading battle fleet shot down the ''[[Starbreaker 12]]''.

{{Char-stub}}
